title: Announcing 2 new features for your favorite monday.com <> Slack integration app

posts.author: asharma (Ankur Sharma - Upscale (Part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!

Over here at Integrate Plus for Slack, we’ve been working round-the-clock to deliver some new features that our first set of passionate users requested the most in their feedback about our app.

To that end, we’ve upgraded our app with two brand-new features designed to enhance your productivity and supercharge your efficiency while using the app to integrate your monday.com and Slack workspaces:

  1. Personal Notifications
  2. Automation Recipes

Read our latest blog to learn more about these, or start here if you’d directly like to take our app for a test drive.

Have a great day!
